title: RealMLP expert with full original data in every fold
summary: Train an added RealMLP expert using all original rows in every competition fold.
rationale: The current best parent is 001199 with CV 0.9544491320 and public 0.95409. This hypothesis is an atomic child patch intended to exploit the confirmed two-seed RealMLP core plus low-weight CatBoost correction direction.
implementation_hint: Start from 001199. For an additional RealMLP expert only, train on competition training fold plus all original rows, and validate only on the held-out competition fold. Blend this expert lightly with the existing parent prediction.
expected_effect: Use all available original data for training while preserving competition-only validation.
risk: Full original data can shift the learned distribution and hurt public ranking.
